description: An employee has resigned, and HR needs to conduct an exit interview to gather feedback.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a voluntary exit interview with the departing employee.
Conduct the interview using a standardized set of questions regarding their experience and reason for leaving.

expected_outcome.value: HR representative asks all standard questions and documents the employee's feedback.

nodes.task_description: Enter the feedback into the HR system to be used for aggregate turnover analysis.

expected_outcome.value: The feedback is logged in the system under the appropriate categories.
